solutionRows.label: AI Copilot
solutionRows.value: Natural language answers for your leadership

problem.title: Spreadsheets everywhere, visibility nowhere
problem.subtitle: Legacy ERPs are expensive and ignore African field reality. Every lost batch is margin gone.

points.title: Invisible stock
points.body: Perishable materials, inventory gaps, unexpected stockouts. No real-time visibility.

points.title: Gut-feel planning
points.body: No MRP. Orders based on guesswork. Result: overproduction, shortages, shrinking margins.

points.title: Leaders without data
points.body: Reports arrive late and unreadable. Strategic calls made in the dark.

problem.solutionBody: Bluwa guarantees your margin and operational rigor: multi-site, multi-currency, with an AI copilot that answers your leadership in real time.

features.title: Everything your plant needs, from day one.
features.subtitle: 6 integrated modules. 1 platform. From master data to gross margin, every link in the chain is covered.

items.title: Master Data (MDM)
items.body: Items, BOMs, customers, suppliers and work centres. Clean reference data: the foundation every Bluwa insight rests on.

items.title: Production & Shop Floor
items.body: Work orders, shop floor tracking (MES) and batch management. From production plan to field declaration, uninterrupted.

items.title: Planning & MRP
items.body: Forecasts, consolidated customer demand, Supply Planning and MRP. Needs calculated automatically, shortages anticipated.

items.title: Purchasing & Stock
items.body: Procurement, receiving, FEFO/FIFO stock and inventory. Cash under control, zero unplanned stockouts.

items.title: Sales & Order Management
items.body: Customer orders, order administration and delivery notes. From quote to delivery, tracked in real time.

items.title: Quality & Reporting
items.body: Batch release, non-conformances, genealogy, DMS and margin analysis per batch. HACCP compliance and leadership visibility in one place.

presence.title: Built for the whole of West Africa
presence.subtitle: 16 countries · 500 million people · A market virtually untapped by industrial agri-food ERP.

pilot.title: Become a founding client.
pilot.subtitle: 10 pioneering companies to co-build the ERP standard for African agri-food. Limited spots.

items.q: How does the guaranteed paid trial work?
items.a: You pay the one-time installation fee at signing (covers setup, configuration and 3 months of support). The first SaaS month is on us. Not the right fit after 30 days? Walk away, no further billing.

items.q: What do the installation fees cover?
items.a: Technical setup, configuration, initial settings, team training, and 3 months of post-install support. It's a one-time payment at signing.

items.q: Is there a discount for annual commitment?
items.a: Yes. A 12-month commitment gives you 2 free months (≈ 15% off). Option A: pay 10 months upfront. Option B: pay monthly with a 12-month contract.

items.q: Can Bluwa scale with my group's growth?
items.a: Yes. Bluwa is built to grow with you, from a single production unit to a multi-site, multi-country group. The factory core (V1) extends to ADV and Logistics WM (Phase 2), then Engineering & Methods (Phase 3). Enterprise clients get priority access to every extension.
Yes. Field apps (production, inventory) work without connectivity and sync automatically.
Mobile money (Wave, Orange Money, MTN), Sage, Excel, plus API connectors for your existing tools.
